title: Fracture Point
description: A military style armor mod with high quality 3d armor and backpacks
body:
**Requires Geckolib  and Curios API**

### **Does Not Work With Optifine, Use Embeddium**

Warborn is a tactical armor mod in the military style. This mod aims to add a diverse amount of armor. Keep in mind this mod is early in development

Adds 5 types of armor, 8 sets total with color variations included
Adds backpacks
Adds night vision

Report bugs or join for fun in the Zarra Studios discord here: https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW

Plans:

Add leggings
Add more armor
Add shader night vision
Animations for parts of the armor like vests and having magazines increase as you fill up more space

A mod developed by Zarra Studios

Please report bugs to the discord or github

Only code is open-sourced, not assets
